name: @op1/delegation
description: Async task delegation plugin for OpenCode with background output, cancellation, and citation-friendly task records

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/delegation.js --target bun --format esm --external @opencode-ai/plugin && bun build src/tui/index.ts --outfile dist/tui.js --target bun --format esm --external @opencode-ai/plugin && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --declarationMap false --outDir dist
